Package noppes.npcs.api.handler.data

Interface IRecipe

  • public interface IRecipe
    Represents a custom crafting recipe for the carpentry table or vanilla workbench.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void delete()
      Deletes this recipe from the handler.
      int getHeight()  
      int getId()  
      boolean getIgnoreDamage()  
      boolean getIgnoreNBT()  
      String getName()  
      net.minecraft.item.ItemStack[] getRecipe()  
      net.minecraft.item.ItemStack getResult()  
      int getWidth()  
      boolean isGlobal()  
      void setIgnoreDamage​(boolean ignoreDamage)  
      void setIgnoreNBT​(boolean ignoreNBT)  
      void setIsGlobal​(boolean global)  

    • Method Detail

      • getName

        String getName()
        Returns:
        the recipe display name.

      • isGlobal

        boolean isGlobal()
        Returns:
        true if this is a global (vanilla workbench) recipe.

      • setIsGlobal

        void setIsGlobal​(boolean global)
        Parameters:
        global - true for global; false for carpentry only.

      • getIgnoreNBT

        boolean getIgnoreNBT()
        Returns:
        true if NBT data is ignored when matching ingredients.

      • setIgnoreNBT

        void setIgnoreNBT​(boolean ignoreNBT)
        Parameters:
        ignoreNBT - true to ignore NBT in ingredient matching.

      • getIgnoreDamage

        boolean getIgnoreDamage()
        Returns:
        true if damage values are ignored when matching ingredients.

      • setIgnoreDamage

        void setIgnoreDamage​(boolean ignoreDamage)
        Parameters:
        ignoreDamage - true to ignore damage in ingredient matching.

      • getWidth

        int getWidth()
        Returns:
        the recipe grid width.

      • getHeight

        int getHeight()
        Returns:
        the recipe grid height.

      • getResult

        net.minecraft.item.ItemStack getResult()
        Returns:
        the resulting item stack.

      • getRecipe

        net.minecraft.item.ItemStack[] getRecipe()
        Returns:
        the ingredient item stacks in grid order.

      • delete

        void delete()
        Deletes this recipe from the handler.

      • getId

        int getId()
        Returns:
        the unique recipe ID.
